title: Mega Showdown: Repolished Extras
description: Adds extra compats to Twispan's Resource Pack!
body:
[Download the Original!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/megashowdown_repolished)

[Credits to axoleah for getting a lot of the colors right for the stones!](https://modrinth.com/user/axoleah)

This resource pack adds compatability between Twispan's Mega Showdown Repolished resource pack and other mods/datapacks that add megas!

Compatability List

- [Mega Showdown Extras by RobinFloof (Yours' Truly)](https://modrinth.com/project/msd-extra-megas!)
- [Laser's Fakemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lasers-fakemon-pack)
- [Horret's Extended Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/horrets-extended-megas-cobblemon)
- [Yuhan's Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/yuhans-mega-collection-flygon-and-sylveon)
